title: Replace service gallery images with uploaded Instagram screenshots

requirements.summary: Replace existing service gallery images in ServicesGallery component with 8 uploaded Instagram screenshots in specified order
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 uploaded Instagram screenshots are displayed in the Services Gallery section
Images appear in the exact order specified matching the tarot service categories
Each image maintains its original quality and aspect ratio
The gallery layout remains responsive and visually consistent with the mystical theme

file_operations.description: Verify that the component correctly imports and renders the updated serviceGalleryImages array. Ensure the responsive grid layout and hover effects remain intact while displaying the 8 new Instagram screenshot images in the specified order.

requirements.summary: Update serviceGalleryImages data array to reference the 8 new uploaded screenshot filenames
acceptanceCriteria: The serviceGalleryImages array contains exactly 8 entries
Each entry maps to the correct uploaded screenshot filename

The order matches the sequence: Career/Money/Life section, Love & Relationship, Future/Deep sections, Forecasts with CTA, Money/Life Purpose, Premium services, Mini Readings, Premium/Exclusive details
All image paths correctly point to the generated assets directory

file_operations.description: Replace the entire serviceGalleryImages array to contain exactly 8 entries mapping to the uploaded Instagram screenshots in this order: 1) Screenshot_20260223-202001_Instagram-2.jpg (Career/Money/Life section header), 2) Screenshot_20260223-202059_Instagram-2.jpg (Love & Relationship services), 3) Screenshot_20260223-202107_Instagram-2.jpg (Future of This Connection and Deep & Detailed header), 4) Screenshot_20260223-202112_Instagram-2.jpg (1 Month Forecast and 3 Month Forecast with Schedule Your Reading button), 5) Screenshot_20260223-202008_Instagram-2.jpg (Money & Abundance Reading and Life Purpose/Direction Reading), 6) Screenshot_20260223-202048_Instagram-2.jpg (Personalized Voice Note Reading and Emergency Same-Day Reading with Love & Relationship header), 7) Screenshot_20260223-202025_Instagram-2.jpg (Mini Readings with 1 Question Reading and 3 Card Reading), 8) Screenshot_20260223-202043_Instagram-2.jpg (Premium/Exclusive with Soulmate/Twin Flame Reading and Personalized Voice Note Reading). All image paths must use the format '/assets/Screenshot_20260223-HHMMSS_Instagram-2.jpg' pointing to the public assets directory.

requirements.summary: Render all 8 uploaded Instagram screenshot images as static assets in the frontend/public/assets directory
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 screenshots are saved in frontend/public/assets/
Filenames are descriptive and indicate the service category or section they represent
Images maintain their original quality and format
File paths are correctly referenced in the serviceGalleryImages data

file_operations.description: Copy the uploaded Instagram screenshot Screenshot_20260223-202001_Instagram-2.jpg showing the Career/Money/Life section header to frontend/public/assets/. This image displays the Tarot Reading Services title with the Career/Money/Life category header and Career Guidance Reading card.

Copy the uploaded Instagram screenshot Screenshot_20260223-202059_Instagram-2.jpg showing Love & Relationship services to frontend/public/assets/. This image displays the Love & Relationship category icon with Love Guidance Reading, No Contact/Separation Reading, and Does He/She Love Me cards.

Copy the uploaded Instagram screenshot Screenshot_20260223-202107_Instagram-2.jpg showing Future of This Connection and Deep & Detailed sections to frontend/public/assets/. This image displays the Future of This Connection card (₹599) and the Deep & Detailed category header with Full Tarot Spread card.

Copy the uploaded Instagram screenshot Screenshot_20260223-202112_Instagram-2.jpg showing forecast services with CTA button to frontend/public/assets/. This image displays the 1 Month Forecast card (₹899) and 3 Month Forecast card (₹1,499) with the purple 'Schedule Your Reading' call-to-action button at the bottom.

Copy the uploaded Instagram screenshot Screenshot_20260223-202008_Instagram-2.jpg showing Money & Abundance and Life Purpose readings to frontend/public/assets/. This image displays the Money & Abundance Reading card (₹499) and Life Purpose/Direction Reading card (₹699) with the Mini Readings category icon visible below.

Copy the uploaded Instagram screenshot Screenshot_20260223-202048_Instagram-2.jpg showing premium voice note and emergency services to frontend/public/assets/. This image displays the Personalized Voice Note Reading card (₹1,999), Emergency Same-Day Reading card (+₹300 EXTRA), and the Love & Relationship category icon at the bottom.

Copy the uploaded Instagram screenshot Screenshot_20260223-202025_Instagram-2.jpg showing Mini Readings offerings to frontend/public/assets/. This image displays the Mini Readings category icon with 1 Question Reading card (₹199) and 3 Card Reading card (₹299), plus the Premium/Exclusive category icon at the bottom.

Copy the uploaded Instagram screenshot Screenshot_20260223-202043_Instagram-2.jpg showing Premium/Exclusive services to frontend/public/assets/. This image displays the Premium/Exclusive category icon with Soulmate/Twin Flame Reading card (₹1,499) and Personalized Voice Note Reading card (₹1,999).
